akus.body: Mātṛkābhedatantra
Mātṛkābhedatantra, trayodaśaḥ paṭalaḥ śrīcaṇḍikovāca / śṛṇu nātha parānanda parāparajagatpate / idānīṃ śrotum icchāmi mālāyāḥ kīdṛśo japaḥ / kā mālā kasya devasya tad vadasva samāhitaḥ //
śrīśaṃkara uvāca / vaiṣṇave tulasīmālā gajadantair gaṇeśvare / kālikāyā mahāmantraṃ japed rudrākṣamālayā //
tārāyāś ca japen mantrī mahāśaṅkhākhyamālayā / mahāśaṅkhākhyamālāyāṃ sarvāṃ vidyāṃ japet sudhīḥ //
akasmād vai mahāsiddhir mahāśaṅkhākhyamālayā / tathaiva sakalā vidyā mahāśaṅkhe vaset sadā //
sphāṭikī sarvadevasya pravālaiḥ sakalāṃ japet / svarṇaraupyasamudbhūtāṃ sarvadeveṣu yojitām //
kālikāyāś ca sundaryā rudrākṣaiḥ prajapet sadā / bhairavyāḥ prajapen mantrī śaṅkhapadmākhyayā priye //
śmaśāne dhusturair mālā japed dhūmāvatīvidhau / iti te kathitaṃ kānte mahāmālāvinirṇayam //
atha granthiṃ pravakṣyāmi śṛṇu kānte samāhitā / yena mālā susiddhā ca nṇāṃ sarvaphalapradā //
mālāyāś cādhikā kānte granthiś caikā phalapradā / ekapañcāśikāyāṃ ca mālāyāṃ parameśvari //
brahmagranthiyutāṃ mālāṃ sārdhadvitayaveṣṭitām / sapādaveṣṭanaṃ devi nāgapāśaṃ manoharam //
sarvadevasya mālāyāṃ sarvatra parameśvari / brahmagranthiṃ vidhāyetthaṃ nāgapāśam athāpi vā //
mālāyāṃ tv adhikāṃ devi caikāṃ granthiṃ pradāpayet / mūlena grathitaṃ kuryāt praṇavenāthavā priye //
granthimadhye ca guṭikāṃ kuryād atimanoharām / sūtradvayaṃ maheśāni milanaṃ kārayet tataḥ //
meruṃ ca grathanaṃ kuryāt tadūrdhve granthisaṃyutam / evaṃ mālāṃ vinirmāya gopayed bahuyatnataḥ //
kampanaṃ dhūnanaṃ śabdaṃ naiva tatra prakāśayet / karabhraṣṭaṃ tathā chinnaṃ mahāvighnasya kāraṇam //
kampane siddhihāniḥ syād dhūnanaṃ bahuduḥkhadam / śabde jāte bhaved rogaḥ karabhraṣṭād vināśakṛt //
chinnasūtre bhaven mṛtyus tasmād yatnaparo bhavet / evaṃ jñātvā maheśāni śāntisvastyayanaṃ caret //
kampane yo japen mantraṃ yadi siddhiṃ prayacchati / yatnena gurum ānīya dvāviṃśadupacārataḥ //
kumbhasthāpanakaṃ kṛtvā pūjayed iṣṭadevatām / tato huned bilvapattrair aṣṭottaraśatāhutim //
trimadhvaktena vidhinā dhūnane 'pi ca sundari / saśabde japane caṇḍi hy evaṃ kuryād vicakṣaṇaḥ //
karabhraṣṭe tathā chinne puraścaraṇam ācaret / japādyante yajed devīṃ ṣoḍaśair upacārakaiḥ //
pratyahaṃ prajapen mantraṃ pratyahaṃ balidānakam / pañcāṅgasya pramāṇena sarvakarma samāpayet //
daridraḥ parameśāni yadi vighnaparāyaṇaḥ / ādyante mahatīṃ pūjāṃ diksahasraṃ japen manum //
sahasraikaṃ hunet paścāt sarvavighnasya śāntaye / kumbhatoyaiḥ snāpayitvā punar mālāṃ pradāpayet //
anenaiva vidhānena vighnajālair na lipyate //
